pageContext.name: M90 Micro Blaster x Big Power
pageContext.description: Sideshow and New Wave Toys are proud to present the M90 Micro Blaster, an accurately reproduced 1:6 scale replica of the 'King of Boomboxes' that fits perfectly with the RepliCade line of miniaturized arcade machines. Designed to fill your personal space with full and balanced sound at lower volumes without disturbing your neighbors.  This fully functional Bluetooth speaker features telescoping antennas, an articulated handle, a volume control dial, and enough power for up to 20 hours of playtime.   Big Power is a collection of faithfully recreated iconic 1980's boomboxes at a fraction of the size and cost of original vintage boomboxes. Big Power blasters merge legendary boombox design with modern technology and are packed with traditional and contemporary features and accessories.   Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
